description: The enforce_write_capable_phase_target function in daemon_scheduler_phase_targets.rs had hardcoded "gpt-5.3-codex"/"codex" as the write-capable fallback when a non-editing tool (like gemini) was selected. This was changed to "claude-sonnet-4-6"/"claude" but ideally should dynamically pick the first write-capable model from the fallback list rather than hardcoding any specific provider, to avoid this issue recurring when provider quotas are exhausted.
title: Remove hardcoded codex fallback in enforce_write_capable_phase_target
